notices.title: USN-8467-2: Perl vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
USN-8467-1 fixed vulnerabilities in Perl. This update provides the
corresponding fix for Perl on Ubuntu 25.10.

notices.title: USN-8493-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
USN-8492-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
USN-8488-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that some AMD processors did not properly clear data in
the floating point divider unit during speculative execution. A local
attacker could use this to expose sensitive information. (CVE-2025-54505)

USN-8490-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
USN-8489-1: Linux kernel (OEM) vulnerabilities
